scenario.name: register_server
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[field1] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field1];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[field1] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] REGISTER Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Content-Length: 0 User-Agent: Avaya one-X Emulator Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];avaya-sc-enabled;transport=[transport]>;q=1.0;expires=86400 Allow: INVITE,CANCEL,BYE,ACK,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,INFO,REFER,UPDATE

REGISTER sip:[field1] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field1];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[field1] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] REGISTER Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Content-Length: 0 User-Agent: Avaya one-X Emulator Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];avaya-sc-enabled;transport=[transport]>;q=1.0;expires=86400 Max-Forwards: 70 Allow: INVITE,CANCEL,BYE,ACK,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,INFO,REFER,UPDATE [field2]
